docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-15-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
